prompt: Photorealistic studio portrait of a 31-year-old woman, French, warm olive skin, dark brown low bun. Working as Assistant(e) Personnel(le) in a modern Paris office. friendly approachable smile. Wearing beige knit cardigan over white tee. Editorial magazine quality. No text, no logos, no watermarks. Vertical 9:16 composition, subject centered, upper-body framing.
